title: No Crystal Particle
description: Removes crystal explosion particles for better PvP visibility and FPS
body:
# No Crystal particles - No Explosion Particles


> This resource pack removes **end crystal explosion particles** to improve visibility, reduce lag, and boost FPS in Minecraft. Perfect for **Crystal PvP**, this pack clears visual clutter so you can see your opponent, crystals, and pearls more clearly during fights.

![test2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31ee743ef8edd0ba8306778c4e5f28ae31032e9c.gif)


> It also helps during **TNT mining** by removing explosion particles that block your screen.

---

**Features**

* Removes end crystal explosion particles
* Improves visibility in Crystal PvP
* Reduces lag and increases FPS
* Clears explosion particle clutter
* Useful for PvP and TNT mining

---

Works seamlessly with most other packs!



> Other texture packs used in these pictures: 
[Saturated MC](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/saturated-mc)

please support me on paypal
